Career

Welcome to the career section of Nanalysis! We are at the forefront of innovation and discovery, and we are committed to advancing the boundaries of science and technology. Our team is made up of some of the brightest minds in the industry, who are passionate about pushing the limits of what's possible and making a meaningful impact on society. We offer a dynamic and collaborative work environment, where you will have the opportunity to work alongside experts in a wide range of fields, and contribute to cutting-edge research and development projects. We are committed to investing in our employees' growth and development, and offer a variety of training and career advancement opportunities. If you're ready to join a team of scientists, engineers, and researchers who are working to make a difference in the world, we encourage you to explore our current openings and apply today. 

For information on career opportunities, please send your resume to jobs@nanalysis.com with the job title in the subject line. We regret that only successful candidates will be contacted.
